title: VIDEO: 'Shape-Changing' UFO Reported East Of Roswell, Idaho
description: Witnesses in Idaho may have spotted two planets instead of UFOs, stirring intrigue in a town sharing its name with Roswell, NM.

title: Pathology professor and UAP expert on impact of Spielberg's "Disclosure Day"
description: Garry Nolan, a professor of pathology at Stanford University School of Medicine and the executive director of the board for The Sol Foundation, joins CBS News 24/7 to discuss Steven Spielberg's new movie, "Disclosure Day," and its exploration of the existence of aliens on Earth.

title: Get ready for disclosure with our essential UFO reading list
description: Explore the world of UFOs from all angles with these books covering the history, sociology and weirder takes on the phenomenon.
